commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=dab051397ba7c02f2dd217c493cbfc4ddae18480)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Matrix progress rendering to hide raw command text by default while adding Matrix config opt-ins for raw command details.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +76, Docs +1. Total +92 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current source shows Matrix item/tool progress flows through the shared formatter without a Matrix status-only override, while the formatter defaults command text to raw unless configured otherwise.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A narrow automated repair can address the type-contract and docs findings; maintainer acceptance of the default change and real behavior proof remain separate merge gates.

target.title: fix(matrix): hide raw command progress text
target.body:
## Summary
- hide raw command/exec progress text in Matrix draft progress notices by default
- add Matrix `streaming.progress.commandText` and `streaming.preview.commandText` config support so trusted debug rooms can opt back into raw command details
- add Matrix monitor/schema regression coverage and document the safer default

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: a private Matrix room displayed an internal command-progress notice for a GitHub PR edit operation. This was not a normal assistant reply and not itself a real failure assertion; it was a Matrix progress/status artifact exposing raw command text in the room.
- Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout on macOS using the patched PR head `dab051397ba7c02f2dd217c493cbfc4ddae18480`; the command below ran the real patched command-progress formatter with Matrix streaming config objects.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm -s exec tsx -e '<redacted inline probe importing ./src/channels/streaming.ts>'`
- Evidence after fix (screenshot, recording, terminal capture, console output, redacted runtime log, linked artifact, or copied live output): copied terminal output from the patched checkout:

```json
{
  "defaultLine": "🛠️ Exec",
  "defaultContainsRaw": false,
  "defaultContainsPrivate": false,
  "rawLine": "🛠️ gh pr edit 89920 --body explicit-raw-command",
  "rawContainsCommand": true,
  "rawContainsDetail": true
}
```

- Observed result after fix: default Matrix command progress renders status-only `Exec` and omits both the raw command and private argument text; an explicit `commandText: "raw"` configuration still renders the raw command for trusted debug rooms.
- What was not tested: a full live Matrix gateway room delivery was not run from this external PR branch.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: the proof uses a local patched checkout and synthetic non-identifying command text. Live private room identifiers, message identifiers, exact command body, local path, branch/worktree path, transcript text, and agent names are intentionally omitted.
- Before evidence (optional but encouraged): live private room observation showed a command-progress notice equivalent to `gh pr edit <PR_NUMBER> --repo <ORG>/<REPO> --body ...`; private identifying details are redacted.

## Tests and validation

Commands run:
- `pnpm -s exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-matrix.config.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/handler.test.ts -t "hides raw command text in Matrix progress previews by default|allows Matrix progress previews to opt into raw command text"` — 2 passed, 113 skipped
- `pnpm -s exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-matrix.config.ts extensions/matrix/src/config-schema.test.ts -t "accepts Matrix streaming preview tool progress config"` — 1 passed, 9 skipped
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm -s tsgo:core:test`
- `pnpm -s lint:core`

Regression coverage added/updated:
- Matrix monitor tests prove default command progress hides raw command text and raw opt-in still works.
- Matrix config schema test proves `streaming.progress.commandText` and `streaming.preview.commandText` are accepted.
- Matrix docs now describe the safer default and trusted-room raw opt-in.

## Risk checklist

Did user-visible behavior change? `Yes` — Matrix command progress notices now hide raw command text by default.

Did config, environment, or migration behavior change? `Yes` — Matrix streaming config now accepts `commandText` under `progress` and `preview`; default behavior is safer without requiring migration.
target.author: bdjben
